name: per3-writer
description: Write DSI persistence values from shell scripts via OSGi bundle. Enables GEM activation, coding changes, and feature configuration entirely from SD card — no VCDS/ODIS needed.
author: dspl1236
notes: Design phase. Mirrors per3-reader architecture (proven). The GEM enable address needs to be determined by live testing (per3 dump before/after VCDS change). Implementation requires Java OSGi bundle with DSIPersistence.requestWriteInt calls.
